Checks if a game needs to be started after a player joins.

Allows a player to choose a color token if it is available.

The controller of the scene where you have to choose the color

Prompts the user to choose a connection method and sets up the connection.

Initiates the connection process by setting up the GUI view for connection and launching the ChooseConnectionController.

Handle the choice between RMI and Socket.

The controller of the scene where you have to put the server's IP and choose the type of connection

Content - Enum Class in it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model
This enum class represents every resource and object of the game.

This class represents a counter to keep track of a player's number of resources and objects.

The Controller interface serves as a common static type for all controllers.

This class represents a point in two-dimensional space.

createGoldCard(JSONObject, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Deck
Creates a gold card based on JSON object specifications and adds it to the deck.
createNotStructObjective(JSONObject, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Deck
Creates a non-structured objective card from a JSON object and adds it to the deck.
createResourceCard(JSONObject, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Deck
Creates a resource card from a JSON object specification and adds it to the deck.
createStarterCard(JSONObject, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Deck
Creates a starter card from a JSON object and adds it to the deck.
createStructObjective(JSONObject, int) - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Deck
Creates a structured objective card from a JSON object and adds it to the deck.
